_meta.cte_factor: Linear thermal-expansion factor, x10^-7 per oxide MOLE FRACTION (English & Turner / Appen-style set). Used as CTE = sum(mole_fraction_i * factor_i), result in x10^-7/degC. RELATIVE values only - absolute numbers vary by factor set; see thermal-expansion.md and digitalfire.com/glossary/calculated+thermal+expansion.
_meta.role: flux_r2o (alkali flux), flux_ro (alkaline-earth flux), stabilizer (R2O3), glass_former (RO2), colorant, opacifier, other. UMF unity is computed on flux_r2o + flux_ro only.
_meta.source: Molar masses standard. CTE factors are a representative published set; cross-check absolute CTE against Insight/Glazy.

B2O3.note: Functions as a flux but is grouped with stabilizers in UMF; low expansion.

Li2O.note: Strong flux, LOW expansion - useful to cure crazing.

PbO.note: Toxic; not used in studio cone-6 work.

TiO2.note: Also a colorant/variegator and crystallization driver.

Fe2O3.note: Antiflux/amber in oxidation; converts to FeO (powerful flux) in reduction.

CuO.note: Green in oxidation; blood-red (Cu2O) in reduction - biggest atmosphere shift.
